zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan de Norreys II於1188年出生在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯時，他的父親Alan le Norreys32歲，母親Mrs. Alan le Norreys30歲。他於1214年與Jeanne d'Aubigny在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年之後在英國爾塞頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan de Norreys II于1188年出生在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯时，他的父亲Alan le Norreys32岁，母亲Mrs. Alan le Norreys30岁。他于1214年与Jeanne d'Aubigny在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1220年之后在英国爾塞頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan de Norreys II was born in 1188, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, his father, Alan le Norreys, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Alan le Norreys, was 30. He married Jeanne d'Aubigny in 1214, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1220, in Sutton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan de Norreys II est né en 1188, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Alan le Norreys, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alan le Norreys, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne d'Aubigny en 1214, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1220, à Sutton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alan de Norreys II 1188 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan le Norreys 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Alan le Norreys 30. Er hat 1214 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jeanne d'Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1220 in Sutton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan de Norreys II è nato il nel 1188 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Alan le Norreys, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Alan le Norreys, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne d'Aubigny nel 1214, nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1220, nel Sutton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan de Norreys IIが1188年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Alan le Norreysは32歳，母Mrs. Alan le Norreysは30歳であった。1214年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスでJeanne d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1220年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアスットオンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan de Norreys II(이)가 1188년 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan le Norreys(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alan le Norreys(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 Jeanne d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 이후 영국 체실르 수턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan de Norreys II nasceu em 1188, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan le Norreys, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alan le Norreys, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne d'Aubigny em 1214, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1220, em Sutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan de Norreys II родился в 1188 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan le Norreys было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alan le Norreys, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne d'Aubigny в 1214 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1220 г. в местности суттон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan de Norreys II nació en 1188, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan le Norreys, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alan le Norreys, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Jeanne d'Aubigny en 1214, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1220, en Sutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
